entries.source: "Check my essay thesis"
entries.value: "Semak tesis esei saya"

entries.source: "Give me a hint for this physics problem"
entries.value: "Beri saya petunjuk untuk masalah fizik ini"

entries.source: "Help me start this word problem"
entries.value: "Bantu saya mula ini word problem"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Homework Coach on inspir for practice learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Panduan praktikal untuk menggunakan Pembimbing Kerja Rumah di inspir bagi pembelajaran practice, dengan prompt, gelung belajar, dan tabiat AI yang lebih selamat.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: A lebih kuat gelung belajar

entries.source: AI Homework Coach With Hints, Not Answer Dumping is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Get unstuck on homework with hints, examples, and checks that help you do the thinking yourself.
entries.value: Pembimbing Kerja Rumah AI Dengan Petunjuk, Bukan Lambakan Jawapan ialah cara berfokus menggunakan AI untuk pembelajaran, bukan mengumpul jawapan secara pasif. Mod ini dibina untuk membantu anda keluar daripada kebuntuan kerja rumah melalui petunjuk, contoh, dan semakan yang membuat anda berfikir sendiri.

entries.source: AI Homework Coach With Hints, Not Answer Dumping: practical guide
entries.value: Pembimbing Kerja Rumah AI Dengan Petunjuk, Bukan Lambakan Jawapan: panduan praktikal

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Tutor AI

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Tanya untuk kecil pertama step berbanding akhir jawapan.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Minta AI menyemak penaakulan anda, bukan hanya hasilnya.

entries.source: Find the next step.
entries.value: Find seterusnya step.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish oleh writing idea back daripada memory.

entries.source: Homework Coach
entries.value: Pembimbing Kerja Rumah

entries.source: Practice
entries.value: Latih tubi

entries.source: Practice a similar problem.
entries.value: Latihan a similar problem.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompt untuk dicuba

entries.source: Start the live mode at Homework Coach. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Math Step Coach. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Mulakan mod langsung di Pembimbing Kerja Rumah. Jika anda mahukan format pembelajaran berdekatan, cuba Jurulatih Langkah Matematik. Untuk pandangan platform yang lebih luas, baca perkara yang patut dilakukan oleh rakan pembelajaran AI untuk semua orang.

entries.source: Students who need help starting a problem, checking work, or understanding a mistake.
entries.value: Pelajar yang memerlukan bantuan untuk memulakan masalah, menyemak kerja, atau memahami kesilapan.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell mod apa anda ialah trying untuk belajar atau produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Itu difference shows up dalam flow. Bukannya one giant response, terbaik sessions move melalui loop: set goal, try something, get feedback, baiki lemah spot, dan pilih seterusnya action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Fokus itu penting. Chatbot umum boleh menjawab hampir apa sahaja, tetapi mod pembelajaran memberi bentuk kepada perbualan. Ia mengarah anda kepada jenis pemikiran, latihan, maklum balas, atau penerokaan yang membantu idea melekat.

entries.source: The coach supports your thinking without taking over the assignment, so the final work stays yours.
entries.value: Jurulatih menyokong pemikiran anda tanpa mengambil alih tugasan tersebut, supaya hasil kerja akhir kekal milik anda.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Ini ialah same habit behind belajar dengan AI tanpa cheating yourself: keep pelajar active. AI ialah most berguna apabila ia gives anda feedback di anda pemikiran.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Mod ini amat berguna untuk pelajar yang mahu:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Try step dalam anda own words.

entries.source: Understand the mistake.
entries.value: Fahami mistake.

entries.source: Use Homework Coach when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Gunakan Pembimbing Kerja Rumah apabila anda mahukan sesi yang bermula cepat tetapi masih menyesuaikan diri dengan anda. Matlamat pertama bukan untuk kedengaran hebat. Matlamat pertama ialah menjadikan langkah seterusnya terasa mampu dilakukan.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Perkara yang dibantu oleh mod ini

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Ke mana seterusnya

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Anda juga boleh bermula dengan versi kasar masalah sebenar anda. Prompt pertama yang bersepah tidak mengapa. Sesi boleh menjelaskan tahap, khalayak, tarikh akhir, dan gaya selepas anda bermula.
